policy: Fast build renders UI from existing artifacts only. It does not refresh live market data, regenerate research artifacts, or replace the full production pipeline by itself.

steps.name: render-homepage
steps.purpose: Render the canonical homepage from existing committed/generated artifacts.
steps.stdoutTail:

strategy route applied to holdings

$ node scripts/validate-holding-zone-state.cjs
